hooks.command: PORT=$(jq -r ".contextHub.port // empty" .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null || jq -r ".contextHub.port // empty" .jfl/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$PORT" ]; then PORT=4200; fi; curl -sf http://localhost:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || tenet context-hub ensure --port $PORT >> .tenet/logs/context-hub.log 2>&1 || tenet context-hub ensure --port $PORT >> .jfl/logs/context-hub.log 2>&1; true

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then BRANCH=$(cat .tenet/current-session-branch.txt 2>/dev/null || git branch --show-current); MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null | head -1); FILES=$(git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r HEAD 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//'); echo ''; echo '==============================================================='; echo 'JOURNAL REQUIRED: Git commit detected'; echo '==============================================================='; echo "Commit: $(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)"; echo "Message: $MSG"; echo "Files: $FILES"; echo ''; echo 'WRITE JOURNAL ENTRY NOW. File: .tenet/journal/'"${BRANCH}"'.jsonl'; echo '==============================================================='; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then if [ -f "$FILE" ] && ! head -20 "$FILE" | grep -q '@purpose'; then echo ''; echo 'WARNING: MISSING @purpose HEADER'; echo "   File: $FILE"; echo '   Add: /** @purpose One-line description */'; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"status":\s*"completed"'; then BRANCH=$(cat .tenet/current-session-branch.txt 2>/dev/null || git branch --show-current); echo ''; echo '==============================================================='; echo 'JOURNAL REQUIRED: Task completed'; echo '==============================================================='; echo 'WRITE JOURNAL ENTRY NOW. File: .tenet/journal/'"${BRANCH}"'.jsonl'; echo '==============================================================='; fi

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null || jq -r '.contextHub.port // empty' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"PostToolUse"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: done|looks good|ship it|approved|lgtm|perfect|yes do it|go ahead|yeah|yep

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(cat .tenet/current-session-branch.txt 2>/dev/null || git branch --show-current); echo ''; echo '==============================================================='; echo 'JOURNAL CHECK: User approved/confirmed something'; echo '==============================================================='; echo 'If a decision or feature was just approved, write journal entry.'; echo 'File: .tenet/journal/'"${BRANCH}"'.jsonl'; echo '==============================================================='

BRANCH=$(cat .tenet/current-session-branch.txt 2>/dev/null || git branch --show-current); JOURNAL=".tenet/journal/${BRANCH}.jsonl"; if [ ! -s "$JOURNAL" ] 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: No journal entry for session'; else echo 'OK: Journal exists'; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null || jq -r '.contextHub.port // empty' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"Stop"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

BRANCH=$(cat .tenet/current-session-branch.txt 2>/dev/null || git branch --show-current); JOURNAL=".tenet/journal/${BRANCH}.jsonl"; if [ ! -s "$JOURNAL" ] 2>/dev/null; then echo ''; echo 'CONTEXT COMPACTING - WRITE JOURNAL NOW'; echo "File: .tenet/journal/${BRANCH}.jsonl"; fi

nohup sh -c 'git add knowledge/ previews/ content/ suggestions/ CLAUDE.md .tenet/journal/ .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: pre-compact save"' > /dev/null 2>&1 & disown; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null || jq -r '.contextHub.port // empty' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"PreCompact"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null || jq -r '.contextHub.port // empty' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"SubagentStart"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null || jq -r '.contextHub.port // empty' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"SubagentStop"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
